Lab

Interactive browser tools. No install. Web Audio, Three.js, AI APIs.

  • 001

    Arpeggiator & Drum Sequencer

    Web Audio API–driven arp and step sequencer.

    Web Audio API
  • 002

    Sub-Bass & Reese Synth

    MIDI and Web Audio bass and Reese-style patches.

    MIDI · Web Audio API
  • 003

    Sequential Pro-One Emulator

    Browser emulation of classic Pro-One style synthesis.

    Web Audio API
  • 004

    Audio-Reactive Solar System

    Three.js solar system driven by audio input.

    Three.js · Web Audio API
  • 005

    Midjourney Prompt Studio

    Structured prompt builder and tester with Claude API.

    Claude API
  • 006

    FLUXPROMPT — AI Video Prompt Generator

    Generate and refine video prompts via Grok API.

    Grok API
  • 007

    Merge Grotesque

    Dark baroque merge game in the browser.

    Canvas · JavaScript
  • 008

    Homepage Hub

    Experimental homepage designs. Each a standalone vibe — pick what fits the mood.

    GSAP · Canvas API · CSS
